scripts.build: node build-config.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.mkdirSync('public',{recursive:true});['index.html','config.js','export.js','jszip.min.js','pptxgen.full.bundle.js','xlsx.full.min.js'].forEach(f=>{if(fs.existsSync(f))fs.copyFileSync(f,'public/'+f)});console.log('Files copied to public/')"
